executives.name: Rick Van Nieuwenhuyse
executives.background: Mr. Van Nieuwenhuyse has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer since January 2020. He has over 40 years of experience in the natural resource sector. He was previously the President and CEO of Trilogy Metals Inc. and the founder of NovaGold Resources Inc.

executives.name: Jack Kerin
executives.background: Mr. Kerin has served as our Chief Financial Officer since September 2023. Prior to joining the Company, he served as the Corporate Controller for NovaGold Resources Inc. from 2018 to 2023.

board_of_directors.name: Brad Juneau
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Juneau has served as Executive Chairman of the Board since January 2020 and was previously our President and CEO. He is the sole manager of Juneau Exploration, L.P.

board_of_directors.name: Rick Van Nieuwenhuyse
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Van Nieuwenhuyse has served as a director since January 2020. He is also the President and CEO of the Company.

board_of_directors.name: Joseph Compofelice
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Compofelice has served as a director since 2010. He is currently the Chairman and CEO of Modelpoint, Inc. and has extensive experience in the energy and service industries.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Shortz
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Shortz has served as a director since 2010. He was previously a partner at Morgan, Lewis & Bockius LLP and served as an executive at Tosco Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: William Zisch
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Zisch has served as a director since 2020. He has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles at Newmont and Argonaut Gold.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Board of Directors Page
